text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon on my day off, I'm walking by an
outdoor café when I happen upon a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? No way...
Trainer <username>?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Why, hello there. To think I'd bump into you here!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I was going to... but the course I want is only
available for two or more people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She glances at a signboard that reads,
"All-you-can-eat sweets and pastries! Perfect for
partners and pals!"

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? I don't want to inconvenience you
just for the sake of my work...
choice_data_list:
Your work involves coming to an
all-you-can-eat buffet?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Meek told me this café has amazing
food.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So I figured that if I could make some for her, I
could increase her motivation even further!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow trainer, I'm impressed by her
dedication, so I decide to help her with her
"work."

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The parfait cream seems to emphasize the
richness of the milk over sweetness.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But combined with the berry sauce, the aftertaste
is surprisingly light.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Now for this brûlée cake... Ngh! So rich... So
sweet...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
With your help, I was able to try all the dishes I
wanted!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you,
Trainer <username>!
choice_data_list: Will you be able to make them yourself now?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I think so! I'll give it a try as soon as I get home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Listen! Meek beat her fastest time yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
She said it was because the desserts I made really
motivated her. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But I still have a long way to go! I need to keep
researching until I can recreate the flavors of that
café perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I never want to give Meek anything less than
top-class support.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: To that end, I'll spare no effort!
choice_data_list: Let me know if I can help you out again.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>...
Yes, absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin shares some of her homemade
sweets with me as a thank-you for helping out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I eat them together with <chrname>.
